title: I Ran the Fix CLI on 8 F-Grade MCP Servers. Here's the Before/After.
bsky_text:
ran the fix CLI on 8 F-grade MCP schemas.

Context7: F → A. 1,020 → 220 tokens. 7 fixes, automated.
Notion: F → D-. 53 fixes, barely moved.

same CLI. completely different results. it depends on what kind of F you started with. {url}
